rulings.Case Title: CIT COMMUNICATIONS FINANCE CORP. VS. GOLDEN GATE EDITIONS, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO EACH CAUSE OF ACTION DEMURRED TO. NEEDS TO PLEAD PARTICULARITY RE 1ST AND 5TH, ATTACH A LEGIBLE COPY OF THE CONTRACT OR STATE ITS TERMS RE 2ND AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION, AND PLEAD FACTS SUPPORTING STATUTORY VIOLATION RE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION. (302/REQ/RS) Courtcall Appearance: Jasmin Levander, Troy & Gould 310-553-4441 For Plaintiff CIT Communications Finance Corp.
